channel.title: Home Page on Zach DiNucci
channel.description: Recent content in Home Page on Zach DiNucci

item.title: BOISE SCHOOLS AR
item.description: UNITY AUGMENTED REALITY APP/ Spring 2021 About this Game Augmented Reality is a newer technology which hopefully will be able to improve the lives of those who use it. This app is to be used to help teach people how to interact in a society. It has 3 lessons using AR and 1 using an animated video. The 3 lessons are; how to ride the bus, how to keep a safe distance, and how to order food at a restaurant.

item.title: Contact Me
item.description: If you have liked what you have seen or just wish to ask me more questions you can use the contact me box or just enter in the email down below to contact me. I am excited to hear from you and great games to entertain and inspire others. EMAIL zdinucci@gmail.com Send Message

item.title: EXPERIENCE
item.description: Work Experience Best Day HR 2019 - Current I use Blender in order to develop the majority of the assets for my games. I have created rigged characters, created water simulations, and made normal 3d assets within blender. I have used blender for about 3 years at this point. GAME For the majority of games I have used Unity to create them however I have made a few different games using Unreal Engine.

item.title: Food Flingers
item.description: UNITY VIRTUAL REALITY FIRST PERSON SHOOTER/ Spring 2021 About this Game Today is the day of your school’s annual food fight. You and your classmates will battle in the cafeteria in order to see who is best. Use food to hit the other team to knock them out. Use water to clean your team and get help them last longer. In this VR FPS you are the deciding factor of who wins and losses.

item.title: Games
item.description: ALL GAMES VIRTUAL REALITY AUGMENTED REALITY PORTFOLIO ROBO BEATDOWN UNREAL ENGINE VIDEO GAME FOOD FLINGERS UNITY VR GAME PIG UNITY VIDEO GAME QUACK ATTACK UNREAL ENGINE VIDEO GAME MULTIPLAYER BOMBERS UNITY MULTIPLAYER VIDEO GAME AR BOISE SCHOOLS UNITY AUGMENTED REALITY APP $(document).ready(function(){ if (Modernizr.touch) { // show the close overlay button $(".close-overlay").removeClass("hidden"); // handle the adding of hover class when clicked $("

item.title: Multiplayer Bomber
item.description: UNITY MULTIPLAYER GAME/ Fall 2020 About this Game Choose your side, are you the easy to maneuver but hard to aim air crafts or the hard to move but powerful AA cannon. In this multiplayer fight its 1 v 3 as we see how can win and if numbers can overcome or will power win. About the Development Multiplayer Bomber was the third game created with the group who created PIG and Quack Attack.

item.title: PIG
item.description: UNITY TOP DOWN GAME/ Fall 2020 About this Game Life in the country side is normally pretty easy. Today is the exception, the crops need planting but the local boar population has been exploding. Defend your corn from these pests and when it is done growing deposit it in the carts. Watch out though, the boars will defend themselves and some have sharp tusks. About the Development PIG was developed as a group project in one of my GIMM classes.

item.title: QUACK ATTACK
item.description: UNREAL ENGINE FIRST PERSON SHOOTER/ Fall 2020 About this Game Ahh the fair, a place where fun and games are a few dollars away. Welcome to Quack Attack the latest game here at our wonderful Fair. The goal is simple, you have 60 seconds to hit as many of the targets with your pellet gun. Can you get the High Score? About the Development Quack Attack was created in the same group as PIG and Multiplayer Bomber.

item.title: ROBO BEATDOWN
item.description: UNREAL ENGINE TOP DOWN SHOOTER/ Spring 2021 About this Game Escape a secret government facility responsible for the research and creation of government warbots like yourself. Fight though the waves of bots in order to earn your freedom and escape. In this top-down shooter you will fight through 10 waves with ever increasing difficulty on 2 different levels. While the early bots might be easy their numbers can become overwhelming especially in the later levels.

item.title: ZACHARY DINUCCI
item.description: Hello! My name is Zach DiNucci I am a junior developer, a game designer, a history buff, and a gamer. I grew up in Boise, Idaho where I attend Boise State University.I expanded my knowledge and built some of my first games through a new program at Boise State called GIMM. Along with attending classes I joined a Dungeons and Dragons club where I became a dungeon master and player.
